acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Shared crate compiles and exports required primitives
- [ ] APIs are typed, no stringly protocol shims
- [ ] Daemon and external consumers can both depend on it
description:
**Problem**
Model/fuzz/stateright depend on daemon internals that should be reusable and typed.
design: Extract reusable repl/wal/proto/durability primitives into shared crate with explicit public API.
title: Create shared daemon-core crate for repl/wal/proto primitives

acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Forward sequence gaps return an explicit replay gap error (no silent Ok path)
- [ ] `next_origin_seq` cannot be committed from non-contiguous replay state
- [ ] Regression test proves gap cannot yield stale durable watermark + advanced allocator next seq
description:
**Problem**
Replay gap handling allows forward gaps to advance `max_seq`/`next_origin_seq` while leaving contiguous/durable watermark behind, creating inconsistent origin state and write refusal/stall behavior.

**Files:** `crates/beads-daemon-core/src/wal/replay.rs`, `crates/beads-daemon-core/src/wal/index.rs`, `crates/beads-daemon/src/runtime/executor/helpers.rs`
design: Make replay progression explicit via a typed state machine: contiguous progression vs gap-detected terminal error. Do not permit committing `next_origin_seq` from non-contiguous state. Gap detection must fail replay hard with structured error.
title: Replay must fail hard on forward origin sequence gaps
